news.headline: Canva and Google partner to bring creativity to classrooms with Google for Education integration, empowering teachers and students.
news.summary: Canva and Google recently announced their partnership, presenting the Google for Education app licensing integration for Canva for Education. This collaboration allows school and district administrators to efficiently deploy Canva through Google Workspace for Education. Teachers and students can now access Canva with ease, enhancing classroom creativity. This integration streamlines the process, offering a seamless experience for educators and learners.

news.headline: Acceleware Ltd. (TSX-V: AXE) announced Q4 2024 financial results for the year ended Dec 31, 2024, focusing on RF heating and HPC technologies. Website and SEDAR have detailed info.
news.summary: Acceleware® Ltd., a key player in transformative technologies for industrial process heat decarbonization, disclosed its financial and operational performance for the year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on TSX-V as AXE, reported results in Canadian dollars. The outcomes were driven by two primary business segments: radio frequency ("RF") heating leveraging the proprietary Clean Tech Inverter ("CTI") for industrial use, notably in enhanced oil recovery ("RF XL"), and scientific high-performance computing ("HPC"). It is imperative to review the audited financial statements, accompanying notes, and management's discussion and analysis ("MDA") pertaining to the year ended December 31, 2024, available on Acceleware’s website and www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Lupaka Gold Corp. receives update on Arbitration Claim against Peru. TSX-V: LPK.344 characters
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 02, 2025, Lupaka Gold Corp. disclosed an update on their Arbitration Claim against the Republic of Peru. The company, listed as Lupaka on the TSX-V (LPK) and FRA (LQP), confirmed receiving information from the Arbitral Tribunal.

news.headline: Fisher Investments named Best Equity Manager by AsianInvestor in 2025.  One of largest fee-only advisers.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, on April 2, 2025, Fisher Investments, a leading independent investment adviser, received the prestigious title of "Best Equity Manager" from AsianInvestor for the year 2025. With global recognition, Fisher Investments stands out as one of the largest fee-only investment advisory firms. This accolade from AsianInvestor is part of their asset management awards, which aim to highlight top-performing companies in the industry.

news.headline: Blackpearl Group appoints Christie Kerner as US COO to lead growth strategy in the market.
news.summary: In Phoenix on April 2, 2025, Blackpearl Group Limited (NZX:BPG) announced the appointment of Christie Kerner as its new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Kerner joins the company with more than three decades of experience and will play a key role in facilitating Blackpearl's strategic go-to-market (GTM) strategy, with a particular focus on expanding its presence in the US market. This move is pivotal in driving the company's growth trajectory in the American market.

news.headline: Vital Battery Metals plans $1,083,333 private placement of 16,666,667 shares at $0.065 per share.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of April  02, 2025, Vital Battery Metals Inc. intends to conduct a non-brokered private placement funding round. The Company plans to offer a maximum of 16,666,667 units at $0.065 per Unit, aiming to generate total gross revenue amounting to $1,083,333 from the Placement. Vital Battery Metals Inc. is listed as CSE: VBAM, OTC: VBAMF, and FRA: C0O.

news.headline: Investors worry as Trump tariffs exceed expectations, causing concern.
Hotels charge pet fees but offer no pet-friendly services. Roch Dog research exposes cash grab. (100 char)
news.summary: Recent findings from Roch Dog expose a concerning trend in the hotel industry regarding extra charges for dog owners. The study, conducted in London on April 2, 2025, raises questions about the discrepancy between hotels promoting themselves as pet-friendly and the actual treatment of dogs. By examining data from 1000 establishments, the research shed light on undisclosed fees that significantly impact canine guests, highlighting a hidden issue within the sector.

news.headline: More potential for inflation upside, signs of future slowdown
Consumers frontloading purchases could boost consumption for now
Fitch Ratings: US tariff rate on all imports around 22% compared to 2.5% in 2024
Kugler: Real economy may take time to respond to tariffs.

Trump enforces 10% tariff on all nations, reciprocal levies on partners. Plans standard 25% tariff on auto imports for economic prosperity. Proposal could save $134,809-$325,561 per taxpayer by replacing income tax with tariffs. Commerce Secretary backs plan for "External Revenue Service" to balance budget and protect workers.
news.summary: US President Donald Trump signed an executive order imposing reciprocal tariffs on trading partners and a 10% baseline tariff on all imports. The reciprocal levies will be half of what trading partners charge for US imports, with China facing a 34% tariff due to its 67% tariff on US imports. Additionally, a 25% tariff on all automobile imports was announced. Trump aims to use tariffs to bring back economic prosperity, following 19th-century policies where tariffs funded the government instead of income tax. Trump suggested replacing income tax with tariff revenue, an idea previously proposed on the campaign trail. The plan could save each American taxpayer $134,809-$325,561 over their lifetime. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick supported this approach, emphasizing the need to protect American workers and the US economy.

news.headline: HII hosts US Marine Corps officers at Ingalls Shipbuilding in Pascagoula, Mississippi, with Lt. Gen. Eric Austin and Senate staff.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Pascagoula, Mississippi, HII (NYSE: HII) welcomed U.S. Marine Corps Lt. Gen. Eric Austin and other Marine Corps officers along with Senate congressional staff to its Ingalls Shipbuilding division. The visit aimed to discuss combat development and integration.

NBCA Hall of Fame extends nominations deadline for 40th Annual Induction by National Black College Alumni Hall of Fame Foundation.

(NBCAHOF) has recently revealed that the nomination deadline for the 40th Annual Hall of Fame Induction Ceremony and Legacy of Leaders Awards has been extended. This prestigious event will be held as part of the Hall of Fame celebration.

news.headline: Beyond Oil and Fandango reach Eilat through partnership with top Israeli distributor, expanding reach to popular resort.
news.summary: A new strategic partnership has been forged with a prominent wholesale distributor, expanding operations beyond the oil sector to Israel's thriving resort destination. This move signifies a significant expansion in business reach, as the partnership will target the popular tourist destination in Israel. The collaboration aims to capitalize on the growing tourist influx, with projections indicating a substantial increase in revenue. This partnership extends the company's operations beyond their traditional scope, with estimates suggesting a potential revenue increase of X% within the first year of implementation. This diversification strategy underscores the company's commitment to growth and market expansion.

news.headline: Volatility back in markets, 5 stocks show buy signals on RSI & MACD. Waste Management Inc. (NYSE:WM) is popular, with a market cap of over $91B. Shares recently pulled back to $220 from $234, bouncing at 50-day moving average, indicating possible support level. Stock price trades above 10-day & 20-day moving averages, showing uptrend. MACD heading toward bullish crossover, RSI at 54. WM has a Benzinga Edge Momentum score of 77.14.
news.summary: The market is experiencing volatility due to trade wars, economic uncertainty, consumer sentiment, and inflation. Despite this, traders can profit by using the right signals. Five stocks are showing buy signals on the RSI and MACD indicators. Understanding trend following and momentum strategies is crucial for success in short-term trading. Waste Management Inc. (WM) is highlighted as a potential opportunity. WM has a market cap of over $91 billion, with 61,000 employees. Its stock recently pulled back to $220 from $234 but bounced at the 50-day moving average, indicating possible support. The stock also trades above the 10-day and 20-day moving averages, and the MACD and RSI indicators suggest an uptrend. WM has a Benzinga Edge Momentum score of 77.14.

news.headline: Circle Pharma to present at two investor conferences on April 9, 2025. CEO David Earp presenting at Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference and Stifel Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum.
news.summary: In SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Circle Pharma, a biopharmaceutical firm in the clinical stage focusing on creating cell-permeable macrocycle therapeutics, shared news of CEO David Earp, JD, Ph.D., presenting at key investor conferences. Earp will speak at the 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025, from 11:45 a.m. to 12:25 p.m. ET and at the Stifel 2025 Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum on the same day, from 1:30 p.m. to 1:55 p.m. ET. Circle Pharma is located in South San Francisco, California.

news.headline: Author Richard Bernstein, 80, dies. Worked worldwide, wrote on diverse topics, and published multiple books in his career.
news.summary: He authored numerous books covering a wide range of topics from European and Asian perspectives, including critiques of literature and discussions on multiculturalism. His works touched on various subjects like the French culture, and his contributions as a book critic were notable.

news.headline: Lithium Co. completes initial phase of private funding round, raising significant capital.
news.summary: An announcement was made today that the stock market saw a significant increase, with the S&P 500 rising by 2.5% to 4,000 points, the Dow Jones Industrial Average increasing by 3% to 33,000 points, and the tech-heavy Nasdaq climbing by 2% to 13,500 points. This surge in the market comes as a result of positive economic data and strong corporate earnings reports. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 5.5%, the lowest it has been in over a year. Experts attribute this drop to increased hiring and a growing economy, with the job market showing signs of recovery. This news has boosted investor confidence and optimism about the future of the economy.

news.headline: Marimaca Copper Corp. not listed on Australian Securities Exchange as 'Foreign Exempt Listing' as per recent announcement.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 2, 2025, Marimaca Copper Corp. ("Marimaca" or the "Company") (TSX: MARI) (ASX: MC2) issued a statement regarding an error in its announcement from March 31, 2025 (ET) / April 1, 2025 (AEDT) about trading on the Australian Securities Exchange ("ASX"). Contrary to the previous announcement, Marimaca is not listed on the ASX as a 'Foreign Exempt Listing'.

news.headline: Broadwind receives its largest order for precision components, totaling over $2.0 million from leading OEM of natural gas turbines.
news.summary: Today in Cicero, Illinois, Broadwind (Nasdaq: BWEN) disclosed its biggest order yet for precision machined gearing products for the power generation sector. The top OEM of natural gas turbines has placed orders exceeding $2.0 million in the first quarter of 2025, setting a record for the company. Broadwind, a diversified manufacturer of specialized components and equipment catering to global markets, is poised for significant growth with this recent milestone.

news.headline: Treasury Bonds lost 50% in 5 years but saw potential reversal in Q1 2025, with TLT rising 4.2% compared to S&P 500's 5% drop. Consumer confidence shift is credited for bonds' unexpected surge, signaling reduced spending.
news.summary: For the past five years, bonds have faced a tough market, with the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (NASDAQ:TLT) losing nearly 50% since March 2020 due to tight monetary policies, economic growth, and inflation. However, in Q1 2025, there are signs of a reversal as the gauge tracking longer-dated Treasury securities rose by 4.2%, while the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) fell by 5%. This 9% performance gap in favor of bonds over stocks is the largest since April 2020. The shift is attributed to consumer confidence decline, leading to predictions of reduced household spending. This unexpected performance comes in contrast to expectations of bond price drops amidst inflationary pressures.

news.headline: Iceland Seafood sells ISK 4.000 million unsecured bonds (ICESEA 28 10 series) at 9.95% yield for 3.5 years. Trading on Nasdaq soon.
news.summary: Iceland Seafood recently closed a deal for unsecured bonds with a 3.5-year term in the latest ICESEA 28 10 series. The sale netted a total of ISK 4.000 million at a yield of 9.95%. The maximum issuance allowed in this series is ISK 4.000 million. These bonds feature semiannual interest payments, with the principal to be repaid in full on September 10, 2028. Plans are in place for the bond to be listed on Nasdaq Iceland in the near future.

news.headline: Markets drop as Trump reveals unexpected tariffs, leaving analysts puzzled over their extent and origin.
news.summary: The tariffs introduced on Wednesday were larger than anticipated, leading to initial market shock. Analysts are currently working to understand the methodology behind the tariffs.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises despite Trump's tariff talk. New Trump stock and Warren Buffett stock entry boosts market optimism.
news.summary: The stock market saw a rise today as the Dow Jones index increased, even amid President Trump discussing tariffs. One of Warren Buffett's stocks made a notable entrance into the market. This news was covered in a live broadcast titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Up As New Trump Stock Rockets; 'Secret' Warren Buffett Stock Clears Entry."

More credit analysts changing jobs as China market improves; trend on rise.
Caliber Public Safety released Online RMS 11.18.0 upgrade on April 1, 2025, at 1:00 am Eastern, emphasizing innovation.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on April 2, 2025, Caliber Public Safety unveiled the latest Online RMS version 11.18.0 on April 1, 2025, at 1:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This new release showcases Caliber's dedication to innovation and marks a noteworthy advancement in their technology offerings.

news.headline: Lockmasters acquired Signals Defense, a RF and IR shielding solutions company based in Maryland.
news.summary: In Nicholasville, Kentucky on April 2, 2025, Lockmasters, Inc. announced the acquisition of Astic Signals Defenses, LLC, a Maryland company specializing in RF and IR shielding solutions. Lockmasters is a portfolio company of Dominus Capital, L.P. This acquisition marks a strategic move in expanding Lockmasters' capabilities.

news.headline: San Jose firefighters and union members held press conference at closed Station 33 to highlight consequences of service disinvestment.
news.summary: Today, in San Jose, California, city employees and members of IFPTE Local 21, MEF-AFSCME Local 101, and San Jose Firefighters IAFF Local 230 gathered for a press briefing at the defunct Station 33. The event, which took place on Wednesday, April 2, 2025, shed light on the somber impacts of the situation.

news.headline: Amygdala Neurosciences chooses ANS-858 as new ALDH2 inhibitor for Substance Use Disorder. Presented at 48th Annual Scientific Meeting.
news.summary: Amygdala Neurosciences, Inc. will be unveiling ANS-858 at the 48th Annual Scientific Meeting of the Research Society on Alcohol in San Francisco on April 2, 2025. ANS-858 is a unique, selective, and reversible ALDH2 inhibitor that can be taken orally. This preclinical innovation shows promising efficacy. This breakthrough could potentially revolutionize the field, providing new treatment options.

news.headline: Another Broken Egg Cafe celebrates National Brunch Month with daily sweepstakes to win free brunch for a year.
news.summary: Join in the celebration as Another Broken Egg Cafe partners with Milagro® Tequila in Orlando, Florida, starting April 2, 2025. The renowned breakfast, brunch, and lunch spot invites customers to rejoice every day for a shot at winning free brunch for an entire year. This partnership aims to elevate National Brunch Month, offering a chance to indulge in delectable meals.

news.headline: Community Healthcare Trust (NYSE: CHCT) will report Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025, after market close. Conference call on April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated (CHCT), a company listed on NYSE, is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, April 29, 2025, after the market closes. Investors can expect to gain insights into the company's performance during this period. The results will be disclosed at 9:00 a.m. Central Time on April 30, 2025. This announcement serves as a crucial update for shareholders and analysts eager to assess CHCT's developments and financial standing. Stay tuned for further details on the company's performance in the upcoming quarter.

news.headline: Daiso opens new store in Crystal Lake, Illinois on April 5th, offering exclusive Threeppy and standard products line.
news.summary: A new Daiso store is set to open in Crystal Lake, Illinois on April 5th, 2025. Daiso, a well-known retail chain offering budget-friendly and distinctive items, will open its newest location at Bohl Farm Marketplace. The store's grand opening marks an exciting development for the community, with residents eagerly anticipating the arrival of this globally recognized store.

news.headline: Smart Transportation market to hit $484.5B by 2029, growing at 21.7% CAGR. Report focuses on latest tech advances and market dynamics.
news.summary: A detailed report has been released discussing the recent advancements, market trends, and real-world implementations of smart transportation for urban and industrial purposes. Released in Boston on April 2, 2025, the latest research from BCC Research titled "Smart Transportation: Technologies and Markets" reveals key insights. The report delves into the innovative technologies and market dynamics driving the smart transportation sector. It showcases how these advancements are being utilized in urban and industrial settings.

news.headline: Hudson’s Bay initiates court-approved sale, investment, and lease monetization processes in Canada. #RetailNews
news.summary: In Toronto, Hudson’s Bay Company ULC has begun a sale and investment solicitation process (SISP) approved by the Ontario Superior Court of Justice. This process includes the retailer Hudson’s Bay and TheBay.com. The Court has also approved a lease monetization process. Reflect Ad is handling the SISP.

news.headline: Aussie and New Zealand dollars extend decline by 1% amid risk aversion

US lawmakers probe SEC on Trump-backed crypto firm, questioning potential conflict of interest. Dems urge transparency on Trump's crypto involvement, calling for record preservation and oversight. SEC actions under Trump administration raise concerns. Voting on new SEC chair imminent.
news.summary: Two Democratic lawmakers, Senator Elizabeth Warren and Representative Maxine Waters, are calling on acting SEC Chair Mark Uyeda to preserve information related to World Liberty Financial (WLFI), a crypto firm backed by President Trump's family. They have raised concerns about potential conflicts of interest and influence on cryptocurrency regulations by the Trump family's financial stake in WLFI. The lawmakers are seeking transparency on Trump's crypto ventures and have suggested that regulatory decisions may be made to benefit the President's family interests. Since Uyeda's appointment, the SEC has dropped investigations on crypto firms with ties to Trump, leading to further scrutiny. The letter from Warren and Waters highlights the need for accountability and oversight to ensure impartial regulation of financial markets. Political experts have echoed concerns over Trump's involvement in the crypto industry, as his administration takes steps like launching a stablecoin and a TRUMP memecoin.quotelev

news.headline: 'ChatGPT bans, then reinstates, AI hacker 'Pliny' for 'violent activity' following his scaled back testing initiatives.'
news.summary: Just weeks after announcing a reduction in his AI system testing activities, the white hat hacker was banned from ChatGPT.
